scripts.gate: TURBO_PRINT_VERSION_DISABLED=1 turbo run build typecheck test lint fmt:check --log-order=grouped && pnpm --filter @prodkit/tools run adr:check && pnpm --filter @prodkit/tools run changelog:api:check && pnpm --filter @prodkit/tools run invariants:check && pnpm --filter @prodkit/tools run architecture:check && pnpm --filter @prodkit/tools run runnable-gating:check && TURBO_PRINT_VERSION_DISABLED=1 turbo run smoke --filter=@prodkit/tools --log-order=grouped
